basic_details.job_title: MGU Kerala Analytical Instrument Technician Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: The Mahatma Gandhi University Kerala (MGU Kerala) has officially announced the Analytical Instrument Technician Recruitment 2026 with 1 opening. The detailed notification has been published at mgu.ac.in. Candidates up to 36 years of age holding a B.Sc./ M.Sc. in Physics, Chemistry, or Electronics, or a B.Tech./ M.Tech. in Instrumentation Engineering can submit their applications via email on or before 20 July 2026. Direct links to download the official notification and email application details are shared below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 36 years Relaxation for SC/ ST/ OBC as per rules

qualification.education_qualification: B.Sc/ M.Sc in Physics/ Chemistry/ Electronics, B.Tech/ M.Tech in Instrumentation Engineering
qualification.details: B.Sc/ M.Sc in Physics/ Chemistry/ Electronics or B.Tech/ M.Tech in Instrumentation Engineering

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for MGU Kerala Analytical Instrument Technician Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 20-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: MGU Kerala Analytical Instrument Technician Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the MGU Kerala Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download MGU Kerala Analytical Instrument Technician Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for MGU Kerala Analytical Instrument Technician Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 20-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the MGU Kerala Analytical Instrument Technician recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your email application for the Analytical Instrument Technician position at Mahatma Gandhi University Kerala is 20-07-2026.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Analytical Instrument Technician post?
faq.answer: Candidates should possess a B.Sc/M.Sc in Physics/Chemistry/Electronics or a B.Tech/M.Tech in Instrumentation Engineering to be eligible for this post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Analytical Instrument Technician post is 36 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST/OBC candidates as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Analytical Instrument Technician position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 30000 per month for this contract position.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the MGU Kerala Analytical Instrument Technician job?
faq.answer: Eligible candidates need to send their complete application via email to the address specified in the official notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the nature of the job?
faq.answer: The Analytical Instrument Technician position is a contract-based job at Mahatma Gandhi University Kerala.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the job location?
faq.answer: The job is located in Kottayam, Kerala, at Mahatma Gandhi University Kerala.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is 2032/AD.A V 5/2018/എ) വി എ 5.

faq.question: Q10. How many vacancies are available for the Analytical Instrument Technician post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the post of Analytical Instrument Technician in this recruitment drive.
